articles.title: ‘It’s happening’ — 5 Ethereum ETF bidders amend SEC filings
articles.description: Five U.S. asset managers bidding for an Ether ETF have amended their 19b-4 filings with the SEC.

articles.title: BREAKING: Donald Trump Announces He Will Now Accept Cryptocurrency Donations in His Election Campaign
articles.description: According to the update on Donald Trump's official donation website, Trump's supporters can now donate cryptocurrency. The image on the website included Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tether, Solana, USDC, XRP, Dogecoin, Cardano, SHIB and Avalanche. *This is not investment advice. Continue Reading: BREAKING: Donald Trump Announces He Will Now Accept Cryptocurrency Donations in His Election Campaign

articles.title: SEC Leans Towards Approving Spot Ethereum ETFs, Notifies Exchanges
articles.description: The SEC is reportedly moving towards approving Ethereum ETFs, bringing huge market access for Ether.

articles.title: BREAKING: SEC Says to Exchanges That It’s Leaning Toward Approving Ethereum Spot ETFs
articles.description: SEC officials said today they are leaning toward approving exchanges on which Ethereum Spot ETF products will be listed, Barrons reported and people familiar with the matter said. The agency made comments on the applications that, if resolved in a timely manner, could result in approvals as soon as this week. *This is not investment […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: SEC Says to Exchanges...

articles.title: Support from DWF Labs for the Altcoin Hacked Yesterday, Price Recovered!
articles.description: DWF Labs provided support for the altcoin named GALA, which was hacked yesterday, and announced that it had received 25 million GALA tokens. The price started to rise. Continue Reading: Support from DWF Labs for the Altcoin Hacked Yesterday, Price Recovered!

articles.title: Potential Approval of $ETH ETF: What You Need to Know
articles.description: SEC's potential approval of a spot Ether ETF sparks excitement, as Bloomberg analysts raise approval odds from 25% to 75%, signaling a major shift in U.S. crypto policy.

articles.title: SEC asks for updated spot Ethereum ETF filings from US exchanges: Report
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reportedly asked exchanges that would list spot Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded funds (ETF) in the US to update their filings, said Joseph Edwards, head of research at Enigma Securities, to Reuters."Opposing the ETH ETF after the BTC one was approved always seemed like an odd case for the SEC to try to push, unless they were willing to open up...

articles.description: The SEC has taken the first step towards approving spot-based Ether (ETH) ETFs in collaboration with partner exchanges.The article SEC takes surprising step towards approving spot Ether ETFs was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.
